title: Why is Tokyo 3 peppered with craters
display_title: Why is Tokyo 3 peppered with craters
wikitext:
[]: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue Mar 08, 2016 1:27 am Just a quick question, on the EVA-13's descent back down to Earth, there are a panning shots showing craters littered amongst the city. These craters also have craters within craters, I'm just curious as to what caused them. I know a lot of you are going to say debris from the ascension of the Black moon, which I find odd considering it is keeping debris airborne. But let's face it, they're most likely caused by battle right?

[]: Re: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Mar 08, 2016 5:47 am ^ The battle against the Angels has been pretty explosive, to say the least.

[]: Re: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Tue Mar 08, 2016 9:22 pm The majority of it was probably caused by Zeruel, that angel did an incredible amount of damage in a very short time. The crater damage to the geofront itself in 3.33 was consistent with the cratering he gave it in 2.22, including the crater right in the middle of the pyramid (which IIRC is what covered the shaft leading directly to Lilith). The rest were probably caused by previous angels and/or that wild party that happened in between the two films.

Article: Why is Tokyo 3 peppered with craters
[]: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue Mar 08, 2016 1:27 am Just a quick question, on the EVA-13's descent back down to Earth, there are a panning shots showing craters littered amongst the city. These craters also have craters within craters, I'm just curious as to what caused them. I know a lot of you are going to say debris from the ascension of the Black moon, which I find odd considering it is keeping debris airborne. But let's face it, they're most likely caused by battle right?

[]: Re: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Mar 08, 2016 5:47 am ^ The battle against the Angels has been pretty explosive, to say the least.

[]: Re: Why is Tokyo-3 peppered with craters?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Tue Mar 08, 2016 9:22 pm The majority of it was probably caused by Zeruel, that angel did an incredible amount of damage in a very short time. The crater damage to the geofront itself in 3.33 was consistent with the cratering he gave it in 2.22, including the crater right in the middle of the pyramid (which IIRC is what covered the shaft leading directly to Lilith). The rest were probably caused by previous angels and/or that wild party that happened in between the two films.
